title: DBOutputFormat
description: DBOutputFormat is an OutputFormat that sends the reduce output to a SQL table. It accepts <key,value> pairs, where key has a type extending DBWritable. The returned RecordWriter writes only the key to the database with a batch SQL query.

raw_response:
TITLE: DBOutputFormat

DESCRIPTION:
DBOutputFormat is an OutputFormat that sends the reduce output to a SQL table. It accepts <key,value> pairs, where key has a type extending DBWritable. The returned RecordWriter writes only the key to the database with a batch SQL query.
